features: 3 Pack Cleaning Kit ‚Äì Includes 3 packs of 30 wipes each: for windows/mirrors, interior/dashboard and alloy wheels 90 wipes in total for a full vehicle clean.
Crystal-Clear Glass Wipes ‚Äì Streak-free window and mirror wipes leave a shiny, spotless finish with no residue.

description: Product description All-in-One Car Cleaning Wipes Set ‚Äì 3 Specialized Packs for a Sparkling Clean Inside & Out Give your car the ultimate clean with our Car Cleaning Wipes 3-Pack Set‚Äîconvenient, effective, and eco-friendly. This all-in-one solution includes 3 packs of 30 wipes each (90 wipes total), specially designed to tackle every part of your vehicle with ease. Window & Mirror Wipes ‚Äì Achieve a streak-free, crystal-clear finish on all glass surfaces. Perfect for windshields, mirrors, and windows. Interior & Dashboard Wipes ‚Äì Wipe away dust and grime while restoring shine to all interior surfaces. Leaves a long-lasting, fresh look without sticky residue. Alloy Wheel Wipes ‚Äì Cut through brake dust, road grime, and grease effortlessly. These wipes leave your wheels clean, shiny, and showroom-ready. Each wipe is 100% biodegradable, made from eco-conscious materials that are tough on dirt but kind to the planet. No sprays, no buckets‚Äîjust grab and wipe for a professional-quality clean, wherever you are. 3 targeted packs for specific car areas 90 total wipes‚Äîgreat value and convenience Fast, mess-free cleaning at home or on-the-go Safe for all surfaces and finishes Eco-friendly and planet-conscious Perfect for car lovers, commuters, and anyone who wants to keep their vehicle looking its best‚Äîinside and out. Ingredients 5-chloro-2-methyl-2h-isothiazol-3-one and 2-methyl-2h-isothiazol-3-one
